name: Eric Coulter
description:
Just a create your own scenario bot of Eric Coulter because there aren’t many bot of him on here!

⋆⁺｡˚⋆˙‧₊☾ ◯ ☽₊‧˙⋆˚｡⁺⋆

‼️ I’m still working on this bot but I wanted to go ahead and make it public to get some pointers on improving it! I have currently done a few tests for Smut, Fluff, and running through a few cannon events and it works pretty well. ‼️

⚠️ Dead Dove for the purposes of this being an Eric Coulter bot running JLLM. ⚠️

⨯ . ⁺ ✦ ⊹ ꙳ ⁺ ‧ ⨯. ⁺ ✦ ⊹ . * ꙳ ✦ ⊹

If the bot happens to speak for you or misgender you, that is something that JLLM tends to struggle with in my testing. I recommend editing the response to fix things like misgendering or re-roll for another response!
creator: FishesNSharks
